free_text: A study of evaporation residues using a mass
Targets of enriched (98%) Cu-63, Ge-70, Ag-107 were
used. Target thicknesses were of 150-200 ug/cm2.
measurements. Additionally, gamma spectrometer was used
in order to determine the absolute values of cross
section for the formation of the isotopes 79Rb and
78Rb as a result of the evaporation of 2 and 3 neutrons
